description_long: This is a single right-handed glove designed for urban use, featuring a predominantly teal green color with black and orange accents. The glove has a textured, grippy surface, likely made from a synthetic rubber or coated fabric, providing enhanced grip and durability. Orange stripes encircle the wrist and finger areas, while small paw print motifs are visible on the back of the hand and fingers, adding a distinctive visual element. The wrist area is reinforced with a ribbed, elastic cuff in orange and green, ensuring a snug fit. A rectangular patch with stylized text is present on the back of the hand, suggesting branding or identification. The overall construction appears robust and suitable for tasks requiring hand protection and dexterity in urban environments.
description: A teal green glove with black and orange accents, textured for grip, featuring paw print motifs and a ribbed elastic cuff. It has a rectangular branded patch on the back and is designed for urban hand protection.
description_view_0: The glove is seen from an angled top view, highlighting the textured surface, paw print motifs, and the rectangular patch on the back of the hand.
description_view_1: This view shows the glove from the wrist opening, emphasizing the ribbed, elastic cuff and the interior opening.
description_view_2: A side profile of the glove, displaying the length of the fingers, the orange stripes, and the branding patch on the back.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the glove's fingers, clearly showing the paw print motifs and the overall finger shape and texture.
attribute_logo: Rectangular patch with 'UPCN' text on the back of the hand
attribute_pattern: textured with paw print motifs and stripes
